title: primula viscosa f. graveolens
intro: Primula viscosa f. graveolens, also known as Sticky Primrose or Graveolent Sticky Primrose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Primula. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include expectorant, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Primula viscosa f. graveolens include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
